psalm-119-1.verse:
Aleph.
  How blessed are those whose way is blameless,
  Who walk in the law of the Lord.
psalm-119-1.prayer: Lord, help me walk blamelessly by following Your law with a sincere and faithful heart.

psalm-119-2.verse:
How blessed are those who observe His testimonies,
  Who seek Him with all their heart.
psalm-119-2.prayer: Father, teach me to keep Your testimonies and seek You with my whole heart.

psalm-119-3.verse:
They also do no unrighteousness;
  They walk in His ways.
psalm-119-3.prayer: Lord, keep me from practicing unrighteousness and guide me to walk steadily in Your ways.

psalm-119-4.verse:
You have ordained Your precepts,
  That we should keep them diligently.
psalm-119-4.prayer: Father, help me obey Your precepts diligently and take Your Word seriously each day.

psalm-119-5.verse:
Oh that my ways may be established
  To keep Your statutes!
psalm-119-5.prayer: Lord, make my ways firm so I may keep Your statutes with faithfulness and consistency.

psalm-119-6.verse:
Then I shall not be ashamed
  When I look upon all Your commandments.
psalm-119-6.prayer: Father, keep me from shame as I look carefully to all Your commandments.

psalm-119-7.verse:
I shall give thanks to You with uprightness of heart,
  When I learn Your righteous judgments.
psalm-119-7.prayer: Lord, help me praise You with an upright heart as I learn Your righteous judgments.

psalm-119-8.prayer: Father, help me keep Your statutes and never feel far from Your presence.

psalm-119-9.verse:
How can a young man keep his way pure?
  By keeping it according to Your word.
psalm-119-9.prayer: Lord, teach me to keep my way pure by guarding my life according to Your Word.

psalm-119-10.verse:
With all my heart I have sought You;
  Do not let me wander from Your commandments.
psalm-119-10.prayer: Father, I seek You with all my heart. Do not let me wander from Your commandments.

psalm-119-11.verse:
Your word I have treasured in my heart,
  That I may not sin against You.
psalm-119-11.prayer: Lord, help me treasure Your Word in my heart so that I may not sin against You.

psalm-119-12.verse:
Blessed are You, O Lord;
  Teach me Your statutes.
psalm-119-12.prayer: Father, blessed are You. Teach me Your statutes and shape my life by Your truth.

psalm-119-13.verse:
With my lips I have told of
  All the ordinances of Your mouth.
psalm-119-13.prayer: Lord, help my words declare the judgments of Your mouth with reverence and faithfulness.

psalm-119-14.verse:
I have rejoiced in the way of Your testimonies,
  As much as in all riches.
psalm-119-14.prayer: Father, give me joy in the way of Your testimonies more than in earthly riches.

psalm-119-15.verse:
I will meditate on Your precepts
  And regard Your ways.
psalm-119-15.prayer: Lord, help me meditate on Your precepts and carefully consider Your ways.

psalm-119-16.prayer: Father, let me delight in Your statutes and never forget Your Word.

psalm-119-17.verse:
Deal bountifully with Your servant,
  That I may live and keep Your word.
psalm-119-17.prayer: Lord, deal graciously with me so I may live and keep Your Word.

psalm-119-18.verse:
Open my eyes, that I may behold
  Wonderful things from Your law.
psalm-119-18.prayer: Father, open my eyes so I may behold wonderful things from Your law.

psalm-119-19.verse:
I am a stranger in the earth;
  Do not hide Your commandments from me.
psalm-119-19.prayer: Lord, I am a sojourner on the earth. Do not hide Your commandments from me.

psalm-119-20.verse:
My soul is crushed with longing
  After Your ordinances at all times.
psalm-119-20.prayer: Father, let my soul long for Your judgments and desire Your truth continually.

psalm-119-21.verse:
You rebuke the arrogant, the cursed,
  Who wander from Your commandments.
psalm-119-21.prayer: Lord, protect me from pride and wandering. Keep me close to Your commandments.

psalm-119-22.verse:
Take away reproach and contempt from me,
  For I observe Your testimonies.
psalm-119-22.prayer: Father, remove shame and reproach from me as I keep Your testimonies.

psalm-119-23.verse:
Even though princes sit and talk against me,
  Your servant meditates on Your statutes.
psalm-119-23.prayer: Lord, even when others speak against me, help me meditate on Your statutes.

psalm-119-24.prayer: Father, let Your testimonies be my delight and my counselors in every decision.

psalm-119-25.verse:
My soul cleaves to the dust;
  Revive me according to Your word.
psalm-119-25.prayer: Lord, when my soul feels low, revive me according to Your Word.

psalm-119-26.verse:
I have told of my ways, and You have answered me;
  Teach me Your statutes.
psalm-119-26.prayer: Father, I have told You my ways. Answer me and teach me Your statutes.

psalm-119-27.verse:
Make me understand the way of Your precepts,
  So I will meditate on Your wonders.
psalm-119-27.prayer: Lord, make me understand the way of Your precepts so I may meditate on Your wonders.

psalm-119-28.verse:
My soul weeps because of grief;
  Strengthen me according to Your word.
psalm-119-28.prayer: Father, when my soul weeps from grief, strengthen me according to Your Word.

psalm-119-29.verse:
Remove the false way from me,
  And graciously grant me Your law.
psalm-119-29.prayer: Lord, remove the false way from me and graciously grant me Your law.

psalm-119-30.verse:
I have chosen the faithful way;
  I have placed Your ordinances before me.
psalm-119-30.prayer: Father, help me choose the faithful way and set Your judgments before me.

psalm-119-31.verse:
I cling to Your testimonies;
  O Lord, do not put me to shame!
psalm-119-31.prayer: Lord, I cling to Your testimonies. Do not let me be put to shame.

psalm-119-32.verse:
I shall run the way of Your commandments,
  For You will enlarge my heart.
    He.
psalm-119-32.prayer: Father, enlarge my heart so I may run in the way of Your commandments with joy.

psalm-119-33.verse:
Teach me, O Lord, the way of Your statutes,
  And I shall observe it to the end.
psalm-119-33.prayer: Lord, teach me the way of Your statutes, and help me keep it to the end.

psalm-119-34.verse:
Give me understanding, that I may observe Your law
  And keep it with all my heart.
psalm-119-34.prayer: Father, give me understanding so I may observe Your law and keep it with all my heart.

psalm-119-35.verse:
Make me walk in the path of Your commandments,
  For I delight in it.
psalm-119-35.prayer: Lord, make me walk in the path of Your commandments, for I delight in it.

psalm-119-36.verse:
Incline my heart to Your testimonies
  And not to dishonest gain.
psalm-119-36.prayer: Father, incline my heart toward Your testimonies and not toward selfish gain.

psalm-119-37.verse:
Turn away my eyes from looking at vanity,
  And revive me in Your ways.
psalm-119-37.prayer: Lord, turn my eyes away from worthless things and revive me in Your ways.

psalm-119-38.verse:
Establish Your word to Your servant,
  As that which produces reverence for You.
psalm-119-38.prayer: Father, establish Your Word in me and deepen my reverence for You.

psalm-119-39.verse:
Turn away my reproach which I dread,
  For Your ordinances are good.
psalm-119-39.prayer: Lord, turn away the reproach I fear, for Your judgments are good.

psalm-119-40.prayer: Father, I long for Your precepts. Revive me through Your righteousness.

psalm-119-41.verse:
May Your lovingkindnesses also come to me, O Lord,
  Your salvation according to Your word;
psalm-119-41.prayer: Lord, let Your lovingkindness come to me, and let Your salvation come according to Your Word.

psalm-119-42.verse:
So I will have an answer for him who reproaches me,
  For I trust in Your word.
psalm-119-42.prayer: Father, help me answer those who challenge me, because I trust in Your Word.

psalm-119-43.verse:
And do not take the word of truth utterly out of my mouth,
  For I wait for Your ordinances.
psalm-119-43.prayer: Lord, do not take the word of truth from my mouth, for I wait for Your judgments.

psalm-119-44.verse:
So I will keep Your law continually,
  Forever and ever.
psalm-119-44.prayer: Father, help me keep Your law continually, forever and ever.

psalm-119-45.verse:
And I will walk at liberty,
  For I seek Your precepts.
psalm-119-45.prayer: Lord, let me walk in freedom because I seek Your precepts.

psalm-119-46.verse:
I will also speak of Your testimonies before kings
  And shall not be ashamed.
psalm-119-46.prayer: Father, give me courage to speak of Your testimonies before others without shame.

psalm-119-47.verse:
I shall delight in Your commandments,
  Which I love.
psalm-119-47.prayer: Lord, let me delight in Your commandments, which I love.

psalm-119-48.verse:
And I shall lift up my hands to Your commandments,
  Which I love;
  And I will meditate on Your statutes.
    Zayin.
psalm-119-48.prayer: Father, help me lift my heart toward Your commandments and meditate on Your statutes.

psalm-119-49.verse:
Remember the word to Your servant,
  In which You have made me hope.
psalm-119-49.prayer: Lord, remember Your Word to me, the promise that gives me hope.

psalm-119-50.verse:
This is my comfort in my affliction,
  That Your word has revived me.
psalm-119-50.prayer: Father, let Your Word comfort me in affliction and revive my soul.

psalm-119-51.verse:
The arrogant utterly deride me,
  Yet I do not turn aside from Your law.
psalm-119-51.prayer: Lord, when pride or mockery surrounds me, keep me from turning away from Your law.

psalm-119-52.verse:
I have remembered Your ordinances from of old, O Lord,
  And comfort myself.
psalm-119-52.prayer: Father, I remember Your judgments from long ago and find comfort in Your faithfulness.

psalm-119-53.verse:
Burning indignation has seized me because of the wicked,
  Who forsake Your law.
psalm-119-53.prayer: Lord, when I see wickedness, give me holy grief and keep my heart devoted to Your law.

psalm-119-54.verse:
Your statutes are my songs
  In the house of my pilgrimage.
psalm-119-54.prayer: Father, let Your statutes become songs in every place You lead me.

psalm-119-55.verse:
O Lord, I remember Your name in the night,
  And keep Your law.
psalm-119-55.prayer: Lord, help me remember Your name in the night and keep Your law.

psalm-119-56.verse:
This has become mine,
  That I observe Your precepts.
    Heth.
psalm-119-56.prayer: Father, let obedience become the pattern of my life because I keep Your precepts.

psalm-119-57.verse:
The Lord is my portion;
  I have promised to keep Your words.
psalm-119-57.prayer: Lord, You are my portion. Help me commit fully to keeping Your words.

psalm-119-58.verse:
I sought Your favor with all my heart;
  Be gracious to me according to Your word.
psalm-119-58.prayer: Father, I seek Your favor with all my heart. Be gracious to me according to Your Word.

psalm-119-59.verse:
I considered my ways
  And turned my feet to Your testimonies.
psalm-119-59.prayer: Lord, help me consider my ways and turn my feet back toward Your testimonies.

psalm-119-60.verse:
I hastened and did not delay
  To keep Your commandments.
psalm-119-60.prayer: Father, help me hurry toward obedience and not delay in keeping Your commandments.

psalm-119-61.verse:
The cords of the wicked have encircled me,
  But I have not forgotten Your law.
psalm-119-61.prayer: Lord, even when trouble surrounds me, keep me from forgetting Your law.

psalm-119-62.verse:
At midnight I shall rise to give thanks to You
  Because of Your righteous ordinances.
psalm-119-62.prayer: Father, teach me to rise with gratitude and praise You for Your righteous judgments.

psalm-119-63.verse:
I am a companion of all those who fear You,
  And of those who keep Your precepts.
psalm-119-63.prayer: Lord, surround me with people who fear You and keep Your precepts faithfully.

psalm-119-64.prayer: Father, the earth is full of Your lovingkindness. Teach me Your statutes and help me see Your goodness everywhere.

psalm-119-65.verse:
You have dealt well with Your servant,
  O Lord, according to Your word.
psalm-119-65.prayer: Lord, thank You for dealing well with me according to Your Word.

psalm-119-66.verse:
Teach me good discernment and knowledge,
  For I believe in Your commandments.
psalm-119-66.prayer: Father, teach me good discernment and knowledge, for I believe in Your commandments.

psalm-119-67.verse:
Before I was afflicted I went astray,
  But now I keep Your word.
psalm-119-67.prayer: Lord, before affliction I went astray, but now help me keep Your Word with humility.

psalm-119-68.verse:
You are good and do good;
  Teach me Your statutes.
psalm-119-68.prayer: Father, You are good and You do good. Teach me Your statutes.

psalm-119-69.verse:
The arrogant have forged a lie against me;
  With all my heart I will observe Your precepts.
psalm-119-69.prayer: Lord, when lies or pride rise against me, help me keep Your precepts with all my heart.

psalm-119-70.verse:
Their heart is covered with fat,
  But I delight in Your law.
psalm-119-70.prayer: Father, keep my heart tender toward You and let me delight in Your law.

psalm-119-71.verse:
It is good for me that I was afflicted,
  That I may learn Your statutes.
psalm-119-71.prayer: Lord, thank You for using affliction to teach me Your statutes and draw me closer to You.

psalm-119-72.verse:
The law of Your mouth is better to me
  Than thousands of gold and silver pieces.
    Yodh.
psalm-119-72.prayer: Father, let the law of Your mouth be better to me than thousands of pieces of gold and silver.

psalm-119-73.verse:
Your hands made me and fashioned me;
  Give me understanding, that I may learn Your commandments.
psalm-119-73.prayer: Lord, You made me and fashioned me. Give me understanding so I may learn Your commandments.

psalm-119-74.verse:
May those who fear You see me and be glad,
  Because I wait for Your word.
psalm-119-74.prayer: Father, let those who fear You rejoice when they see me because I wait for Your Word.

psalm-119-75.verse:
I know, O Lord, that Your judgments are righteous,
  And that in faithfulness You have afflicted me.
psalm-119-75.prayer: Lord, I know Your judgments are righteous, and even in affliction, You are faithful.

psalm-119-76.verse:
O may Your lovingkindness comfort me,
  According to Your word to Your servant.
psalm-119-76.prayer: Father, let Your lovingkindness comfort me according to the promise You have spoken.

psalm-119-77.verse:
May Your compassion come to me that I may live,
  For Your law is my delight.
psalm-119-77.prayer: Lord, let Your compassion come to me so I may live, for Your law is my delight.

psalm-119-78.verse:
May the arrogant be ashamed, for they subvert me with a lie;
  But I shall meditate on Your precepts.
psalm-119-78.prayer: Father, protect me from pride and falsehood, and help me meditate on Your precepts.

psalm-119-79.verse:
May those who fear You turn to me,
  Even those who know Your testimonies.
psalm-119-79.prayer: Lord, draw those who fear You near to me, so we may know and honor Your testimonies together.

psalm-119-80.verse:
May my heart be blameless in Your statutes,
  So that I will not be ashamed.
    Kaph.
psalm-119-80.prayer: Father, let my heart be blameless in Your statutes so I may not be put to shame.

psalm-119-81.verse:
My soul languishes for Your salvation;
  I wait for Your word.
psalm-119-81.prayer: Lord, when my soul longs for Your salvation, help me wait with hope in Your Word.

psalm-119-82.verse:
My eyes fail with longing for Your word,
  While I say, “When will You comfort me?”
psalm-119-82.prayer: Father, when my eyes grow weary waiting for Your promise, comfort me with Your faithfulness.

psalm-119-83.verse:
Though I have become like a wineskin in the smoke,
  I do not forget Your statutes.
psalm-119-83.prayer: Lord, even when I feel worn, forgotten, or dried out, help me not forget Your statutes.

psalm-119-84.verse:
How many are the days of Your servant?
  When will You execute judgment on those who persecute me?
psalm-119-84.prayer: Father, when I wonder how long hardship will last, help me trust Your timing and justice.

psalm-119-85.verse:
The arrogant have dug pits for me,
  Men who are not in accord with Your law.
psalm-119-85.prayer: Lord, protect me from traps laid by prideful people and keep me faithful to Your law.

psalm-119-86.verse:
All Your commandments are faithful;
  They have persecuted me with a lie; help me!
psalm-119-86.prayer: Father, all Your commandments are faithful. Help me when falsehood or opposition rises against me.

psalm-119-87.verse:
They almost destroyed me on earth,
  But as for me, I did not forsake Your precepts.
psalm-119-87.prayer: Lord, even when pressure feels severe, help me not forsake Your precepts.

psalm-119-88.verse:
Revive me according to Your lovingkindness,
  So that I may keep the testimony of Your mouth.
    Lamedh.
psalm-119-88.prayer: Father, revive me according to Your lovingkindness so I may keep the testimony of Your mouth.

psalm-119-89.verse:
Forever, O Lord,
  Your word is settled in heaven.
psalm-119-89.prayer: Lord, Your Word is settled forever in heaven. Help me build my life on what cannot change.

psalm-119-90.verse:
Your faithfulness continues throughout all generations;
  You established the earth, and it stands.
psalm-119-90.prayer: Father, Your faithfulness continues through every generation. Help me trust Your steady care.

psalm-119-91.verse:
They stand this day according to Your ordinances,
  For all things are Your servants.
psalm-119-91.prayer: Lord, all things stand according to Your ordinances. Help me remember that everything serves Your purpose.

psalm-119-92.verse:
If Your law had not been my delight,
  Then I would have perished in my affliction.
psalm-119-92.prayer: Father, if Your law had not been my delight, I would have perished in affliction. Keep my joy rooted in Your Word.

psalm-119-93.verse:
I will never forget Your precepts,
  For by them You have revived me.
psalm-119-93.prayer: Lord, help me never forget Your precepts, because through them You revive my soul.

psalm-119-94.verse:
I am Yours, save me;
  For I have sought Your precepts.
psalm-119-94.prayer: Father, I am Yours. Save me, for I seek Your precepts.

psalm-119-95.verse:
The wicked wait for me to destroy me;
  I shall diligently consider Your testimonies.
psalm-119-95.prayer: Lord, when danger or opposition waits for me, keep my mind fixed on Your testimonies.

psalm-119-96.prayer: Father, everything earthly has limits, but Your commandment is exceedingly broad. Help me trust Your perfect Word.

psalm-119-97.verse:
O how I love Your law!
  It is my meditation all the day.
psalm-119-97.prayer: Lord, teach me to love Your law and meditate on it throughout the day.

psalm-119-98.verse:
Your commandments make me wiser than my enemies,
  For they are ever mine.
psalm-119-98.prayer: Father, make me wise through Your commandments and help me stand firm against the enemy.

psalm-119-99.verse:
I have more insight than all my teachers,
  For Your testimonies are my meditation.
psalm-119-99.prayer: Lord, give me understanding as I meditate on Your testimonies.

psalm-119-100.verse:
I understand more than the aged,
  Because I have observed Your precepts.
psalm-119-100.prayer: Father, give me wisdom beyond age or experience as I keep Your precepts.

psalm-119-101.verse:
I have restrained my feet from every evil way,
  That I may keep Your word.
psalm-119-101.prayer: Lord, keep my feet from every evil way so I may keep Your Word.

psalm-119-102.verse:
I have not turned aside from Your ordinances,
  For You Yourself have taught me.
psalm-119-102.prayer: Father, help me not turn aside from Your judgments because You Yourself teach me.

psalm-119-103.verse:
How sweet are Your words to my taste!
  Yes, sweeter than honey to my mouth!
psalm-119-103.prayer: Lord, let Your words be sweet to my soul and more satisfying than anything else.

psalm-119-104.prayer: Father, through Your precepts give me understanding and teach me to hate every false way.

psalm-119-105.verse:
Your word is a lamp to my feet
  And a light to my path.
psalm-119-105.prayer: Lord, let Your Word be a lamp to my feet and a light to my path.

psalm-119-106.verse:
I have sworn and I will confirm it,
  That I will keep Your righteous ordinances.
psalm-119-106.prayer: Father, help me commit myself to keeping Your righteous judgments.

psalm-119-107.verse:
I am exceedingly afflicted;
  Revive me, O Lord, according to Your word.
psalm-119-107.prayer: Lord, when I am deeply afflicted, revive me according to Your Word.

psalm-119-108.verse:
O accept the freewill offerings of my mouth, O Lord,
  And teach me Your ordinances.
psalm-119-108.prayer: Father, accept the willing praise of my mouth and teach me Your judgments.

psalm-119-109.verse:
My life is continually in my hand,
  Yet I do not forget Your law.
psalm-119-109.prayer: Lord, even when my life feels fragile or uncertain, help me not forget Your law.

psalm-119-110.verse:
The wicked have laid a snare for me,
  Yet I have not gone astray from Your precepts.
psalm-119-110.prayer: Father, protect me from hidden traps and keep me from wandering away from Your precepts.

psalm-119-111.verse:
I have inherited Your testimonies forever,
  For they are the joy of my heart.
psalm-119-111.prayer: Lord, Your testimonies are my inheritance forever. Let them be the joy of my heart.

psalm-119-112.verse:
I have inclined my heart to perform Your statutes
  Forever, even to the end.
    Samekh.
psalm-119-112.prayer: Father, incline my heart to perform Your statutes forever, even to the end.

psalm-119-113.verse:
I hate those who are double-minded,
  But I love Your law.
psalm-119-113.prayer: Lord, keep me from divided thoughts and help me love Your law with a whole heart.

psalm-119-114.verse:
You are my hiding place and my shield;
  I wait for Your word.
psalm-119-114.prayer: Father, You are my hiding place and my shield. Help me wait for Your Word.

psalm-119-115.verse:
Depart from me, evildoers,
  That I may observe the commandments of my God.
psalm-119-115.prayer: Lord, keep evil influences away from me so I may obey Your commandments.

psalm-119-116.verse:
Sustain me according to Your word, that I may live;
  And do not let me be ashamed of my hope.
psalm-119-116.prayer: Father, sustain me according to Your Word so I may live, and do not let my hope be ashamed.

psalm-119-117.verse:
Uphold me that I may be safe,
  That I may have regard for Your statutes continually.
psalm-119-117.prayer: Lord, uphold me so I may be safe and continually look to Your statutes.

psalm-119-118.verse:
You have rejected all those who wander from Your statutes,
  For their deceitfulness is useless.
psalm-119-118.prayer: Father, help me reject deception and stay close to Your truth, knowing You reject those who wander from Your statutes.

psalm-119-119.verse:
You have removed all the wicked of the earth like dross;
  Therefore I love Your testimonies.
psalm-119-119.prayer: Lord, remove the impurities from my heart and help me treasure Your testimonies above everything else.

psalm-119-120.verse:
My flesh trembles for fear of You,
  And I am afraid of Your judgments.
    Ayin.
psalm-119-120.prayer: Father, fill me with holy reverence before You and teach me to stand in awe of Your righteous judgments.

psalm-119-121.verse:
I have done justice and righteousness;
  Do not leave me to my oppressors.
psalm-119-121.prayer: Lord, help me live with justice and righteousness. Do not let me be overcome by those who seek to do wrong.

psalm-119-122.verse:
Be surety for Your servant for good;
  Do not let the arrogant oppress me.
psalm-119-122.prayer: Father, be my guarantor for good and protect me from the pride and oppression of others.

psalm-119-123.verse:
My eyes fail with longing for Your salvation
  And for Your righteous word.
psalm-119-123.prayer: Lord, when I grow weary waiting for Your salvation, strengthen my faith and renew my hope.

psalm-119-124.verse:
Deal with Your servant according to Your lovingkindness
  And teach me Your statutes.
psalm-119-124.prayer: Father, deal with me according to Your lovingkindness and teach me Your statutes.

psalm-119-125.verse:
I am Your servant; give me understanding,
  That I may know Your testimonies.
psalm-119-125.prayer: Lord, I am Your servant. Give me understanding so I may know Your testimonies.

psalm-119-126.verse:
It is time for the Lord to act,
  For they have broken Your law.
psalm-119-126.prayer: Father, when truth is ignored, help me remain faithful and trust You to accomplish Your purposes.

psalm-119-127.verse:
Therefore I love Your commandments
  Above gold, yes, above fine gold.
psalm-119-127.prayer: Lord, help me love Your commandments more than gold, even the finest gold.

psalm-119-128.verse:
Therefore I esteem right all Your precepts concerning everything,
  I hate every false way.
    Pe.
psalm-119-128.prayer: Father, let me regard all Your precepts as right and turn away from every false way.

psalm-119-129.verse:
Your testimonies are wonderful;
  Therefore my soul observes them.
psalm-119-129.prayer: Lord, Your testimonies are wonderful. Help my soul keep them with joy and reverence.

psalm-119-130.verse:
The unfolding of Your words gives light;
  It gives understanding to the simple.
psalm-119-130.prayer: Father, let the unfolding of Your Word give me light and understanding each day.

psalm-119-131.verse:
I opened my mouth wide and panted,
  For I longed for Your commandments.
psalm-119-131.prayer: Lord, deepen my hunger for Your commandments and satisfy my soul with Your truth.

psalm-119-132.verse:
Turn to me and be gracious to me,
  After Your manner with those who love Your name.
psalm-119-132.prayer: Father, look upon me with mercy and show favor according to Your faithful love.

psalm-119-133.verse:
Establish my footsteps in Your word,
  And do not let any iniquity have dominion over me.
psalm-119-133.prayer: Lord, establish my footsteps according to Your Word and keep sin from ruling over me.

psalm-119-134.verse:
Redeem me from the oppression of man,
  That I may keep Your precepts.
psalm-119-134.prayer: Father, redeem me from oppression so I may freely obey Your precepts.

psalm-119-135.verse:
Make Your face shine upon Your servant,
  And teach me Your statutes.
psalm-119-135.prayer: Lord, let Your face shine upon me and teach me Your statutes.

psalm-119-136.verse:
My eyes shed streams of water,
  Because they do not keep Your law.
    Tsadhe.
psalm-119-136.prayer: Father, give me a heart that grieves when people reject Your truth and turn from Your ways.

psalm-119-137.verse:
Righteous are You, O Lord,
  And upright are Your judgments.
psalm-119-137.prayer: Lord, You are righteous, and all Your judgments are true. Help me trust Your perfect justice.

psalm-119-138.verse:
You have commanded Your testimonies in righteousness
  And exceeding faithfulness.
psalm-119-138.prayer: Father, Your testimonies are righteous and completely trustworthy. Teach me to build my life upon them.

psalm-119-139.verse:
My zeal has consumed me,
  Because my adversaries have forgotten Your words.
psalm-119-139.prayer: Lord, let my zeal for Your truth grow stronger than my concern for myself.

psalm-119-140.verse:
Your word is very pure,
  Therefore Your servant loves it.
psalm-119-140.prayer: Father, Your Word has been tested and proven true. Help me love it with all my heart.

psalm-119-141.verse:
I am small and despised,
  Yet I do not forget Your precepts.
psalm-119-141.prayer: Lord, even when I feel small or overlooked, help me never forget Your precepts.

psalm-119-142.verse:
Your righteousness is an everlasting righteousness,
  And Your law is truth.
psalm-119-142.prayer: Father, Your righteousness is everlasting and Your law is truth. Keep me grounded in what never changes.

psalm-119-143.verse:
Trouble and anguish have come upon me,
  Yet Your commandments are my delight.
psalm-119-143.prayer: Lord, when trouble and distress come upon me, let Your commandments become my delight.

psalm-119-144.prayer: Father, Your testimonies are righteous forever. Give me understanding so I may truly live.

psalm-119-145.verse:
I cried with all my heart; answer me, O Lord!
  I will observe Your statutes.
psalm-119-145.prayer: Lord, I cry to You with all my heart. Hear me and help me keep Your statutes.

psalm-119-146.verse:
I cried to You; save me
  And I shall keep Your testimonies.
psalm-119-146.prayer: Father, I call upon You. Save me and help me faithfully keep Your testimonies.

psalm-119-147.verse:
I rise before dawn and cry for help;
  I wait for Your words.
psalm-119-147.prayer: Lord, from the early morning I place my hope in Your Word. Let my first thoughts belong to You.

psalm-119-148.verse:
My eyes anticipate the night watches,
  That I may meditate on Your word.
psalm-119-148.prayer: Father, keep my mind awake to meditate on Your promises throughout every season.

psalm-119-149.verse:
Hear my voice according to Your lovingkindness;
  Revive me, O Lord, according to Your ordinances.
psalm-119-149.prayer: Lord, hear my voice according to Your lovingkindness and revive me according to Your justice.

psalm-119-150.verse:
Those who follow after wickedness draw near;
  They are far from Your law.
psalm-119-150.prayer: Father, when evil draws near, remind me that You are always nearer still.

psalm-119-151.verse:
You are near, O Lord,
  And all Your commandments are truth.
psalm-119-151.prayer: Lord, You are near, and all Your commandments are truth. Help me remain close to You.

psalm-119-152.verse:
Of old I have known from Your testimonies
  That You have founded them forever.
    Resh.
psalm-119-152.prayer: Father, thank You that Your testimonies are established forever and never fail.

psalm-119-153.verse:
Look upon my affliction and rescue me,
  For I do not forget Your law.
psalm-119-153.prayer: Lord, see my affliction and deliver me, for I have not forgotten Your law.

psalm-119-154.verse:
Plead my cause and redeem me;
  Revive me according to Your word.
psalm-119-154.prayer: Father, defend my cause, redeem me, and revive me according to Your promise.

psalm-119-155.verse:
Salvation is far from the wicked,
  For they do not seek Your statutes.
psalm-119-155.prayer: Lord, keep me from wandering away from salvation by helping me seek Your statutes daily.

psalm-119-156.verse:
Great are Your mercies, O Lord;
  Revive me according to Your ordinances.
psalm-119-156.prayer: Father, Your compassion is great. Revive me according to Your righteous judgments.

psalm-119-157.verse:
Many are my persecutors and my adversaries,
  Yet I do not turn aside from Your testimonies.
psalm-119-157.prayer: Lord, though many oppose me, help me remain faithful to Your testimonies.

psalm-119-158.verse:
I behold the treacherous and loathe them,
  Because they do not keep Your word.
psalm-119-158.prayer: Father, give me a heart that grieves over unfaithfulness and remains devoted to Your truth.

psalm-119-159.verse:
Consider how I love Your precepts;
  Revive me, O Lord, according to Your lovingkindness.
psalm-119-159.prayer: Lord, see how I love Your precepts. Revive me according to Your lovingkindness.

psalm-119-160.verse:
The sum of Your word is truth,
  And every one of Your righteous ordinances is everlasting.
    Shin.
psalm-119-160.prayer: Father, every word of Yours is truth, and every righteous judgment endures forever. Help me trust Your Word completely.

psalm-119-161.verse:
Princes persecute me without cause,
  But my heart stands in awe of Your words.
psalm-119-161.prayer: Lord, when I am treated unfairly, keep my heart standing in reverence before Your Word.

psalm-119-162.verse:
I rejoice at Your word,
  As one who finds great spoil.
psalm-119-162.prayer: Father, let my joy in Your promises be greater than the joy of finding great treasure.

psalm-119-163.verse:
I hate and despise falsehood,
  But I love Your law.
psalm-119-163.prayer: Lord, help me hate every lie and love Your truth without compromise.

psalm-119-164.verse:
Seven times a day I praise You,
  Because of Your righteous ordinances.
psalm-119-164.prayer: Father, let praise continually rise from my heart because of Your righteous judgments.

psalm-119-165.verse:
Those who love Your law have great peace,
  And nothing causes them to stumble.
psalm-119-165.prayer: Lord, give great peace to those who love Your law. Keep me from stumbling.

psalm-119-166.verse:
I hope for Your salvation, O Lord,
  And do Your commandments.
psalm-119-166.prayer: Father, I wait for Your salvation. Help me faithfully obey Your commandments while I wait.

psalm-119-167.verse:
My soul keeps Your testimonies,
  And I love them exceedingly.
psalm-119-167.prayer: Lord, my soul loves Your testimonies. Help me treasure them above all else.

psalm-119-168.verse:
I keep Your precepts and Your testimonies,
  For all my ways are before You.
    Tav.
psalm-119-168.prayer: Father, help me keep Your precepts faithfully, knowing all my ways are before You.

psalm-119-169.verse:
Let my cry come before You, O Lord;
  Give me understanding according to Your word.
psalm-119-169.prayer: Lord, let my cry come before You. Give me understanding according to Your Word.

psalm-119-170.verse:
Let my supplication come before You;
  Deliver me according to Your word.
psalm-119-170.prayer: Father, let my prayer come before You and deliver me according to Your promise.

psalm-119-171.verse:
Let my lips utter praise,
  For You teach me Your statutes.
psalm-119-171.prayer: Lord, let praise continually flow from my lips as You teach me Your statutes.

psalm-119-172.verse:
Let my tongue sing of Your word,
  For all Your commandments are righteousness.
psalm-119-172.prayer: Father, let my tongue sing of Your Word because all Your commandments are righteous.

psalm-119-173.verse:
Let Your hand be ready to help me,
  For I have chosen Your precepts.
psalm-119-173.prayer: Lord, let Your hand help me because I have chosen Your precepts.

psalm-119-174.verse:
I long for Your salvation, O Lord,
  And Your law is my delight.
psalm-119-174.prayer: Father, I long for Your salvation, and Your law is my delight. Keep my hope alive in You.

psalm-119-175.verse:
Let my soul live that it may praise You,
  And let Your ordinances help me.
psalm-119-175.prayer: Lord, let my soul live so it may praise You, and let Your judgments sustain me.

psalm-119-176.verse:
I have gone astray like a lost sheep; seek Your servant,
  For I do not forget Your commandments.
psalm-119-176.prayer: Father, when I wander like a lost sheep, seek me and bring me back, for I do not want to forget Your commandments.

psalm-119-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for the priceless gift of Your Word, Your commandments, and Your faithful promises. Teach me to seek You with my whole heart, delight in Your truth, and walk faithfully in obedience every day. Open my eyes to understand Your ways, strengthen me in times of waiting and affliction, and keep my feet from wandering. Let Your Word be the light that guides my path, the peace that guards my heart, and the wisdom that shapes my life. When I grow weak, revive me according to Your lovingkindness, and when I stray, lovingly bring me back to Yourself. May my life continually praise You as I trust in Your everlasting truth and faithfulness.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
